synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19591 Oracle Linux 9 gcc-toolset-14-gcc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19591
description:
[14.2.1-9]
- Add AS_NEEDED libstdc++.so.6 when only needed through libstdc++_nonshared
  (RHEL-120369)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19591

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19591.html
